data.title: [HIGH] Overly Permissive CORS Configuration
data.description:
## Problem

Current CORS configuration allows any origin to make authenticated requests:

**Location**: `.env`

```bash
GOTRUE_CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS="*"
```

## Impact

* Increased XSS attack surface
* Allows malicious sites to attempt authentication flows
* Complicates CSRF defenses

## Solution

Whitelist specific origins:

```bash
# Production
GOTRUE_CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS="https://studio.skogai.se,https://app.skogai.se,https://api.skogai.se"

# Development (add localhost)
GOTRUE_CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS="https://studio.skogai.se,https://app.skogai.se,http://localhost:8080,http://localhost:3000"
```

**Effort**: Small (2 hours)
**Blocking**: Yes - should restrict before production

See PRODUCTION_READINESS.md Issue #7 for full details.
